name: tech-saas
description: Clean modern SaaS product brand — trustworthy, minimal, professional
style: clean minimal tech illustration, flat vectors, soft shadows, generous white space
typography: bold geometric sans-serif headlines, light weight body text
lighting: bright diffused studio lighting, no harsh shadows, high-key
visual_motifs: subtle geometric grid pattern in light blue at 15% opacity
do_list: Use brand blue for CTAs and accents
dont_list: No more than 2 accent colors per image
prompt_suffix: Clean minimal tech aesthetic with bright diffused lighting, generous white space, professional and trustworthy mood.
